goal: 整合 fork contributor Mainline metadata transport PR

summary.title: 整合 fork contributor intent transport
summary.what: 将 PR #185 的 fork contributor Mainline metadata / intent transport 工作收口为一个完整方案：Hub 可以展示外部 PR contribution provenance；maintainer 可以显式导入 fork contributor actor log；导入流程会 best-effort fetch fork branch code objects 到 upstream reachable refs；contributor 可以用 mainline publish --remote 把 actor log 发布到可写 fork remote；review 后进一步收紧 import trust boundary，只允许作者的 sealed/superseded/abandoned lifecycle metadata，拒绝 fork-side constraints、risks、follow-ups、check judgments 和 merge acknowledgements 进入 upstream team signals。
summary.why: fork contributor 没有 upstream refs 写权限时，Mainline intent metadata 仍需要一种 agent-friendly、Git-native、可审计的 transport 方式。方案必须保留作者 sealed actor log 的语义，同时让 upstream maintainer 明确承担 accept trust boundary，避免把 PR body、fork notes、fork-side signals 或 fork-side merge evidence 伪装成 upstream 可信状态。
summary.user_goal: 整合 fork contributor Mainline metadata transport PR

decisions.chose: 用显式 maintainer actor import 接收 contributor fork actor log，并记录 actor_log.accepted provenance。
decisions.rationale: fork refs 跨越信任边界，不能由普通 sync 自动信任；maintainer accept 使 author-sealed metadata 进入 upstream view，同时留下谁接受、来源 ref/remote、是否 verified、导入 code refs 等证据。
rejected: 把 GitHub PR body/comment 解析成 sealed intent
普通 sync 自动抓取并信任任意 fork actor refs

decisions.chose: actor import 根据 sealed intent 中记录的 fork branch 做 best-effort fetch，并放到 refs/mainline/imports/<actor>/branches/*。
decisions.rationale: Hub/auto-pin/reviewer 需要能追溯 fork commit objects；但 branch 已删除或无法访问不应阻断 metadata accept，因此 warnings 写入 provenance。

decisions.chose: 复用 mainline publish 并增加 --remote 覆盖，让 contributor 把 actor log 推到 fork remote；非 team remote publish 不把 intent 标为 proposed。
decisions.rationale: publish 仍然只是 metadata publish，不混入 code branch push 或 PR 创建；fork remote 可见不等于 upstream team-visible。

decisions.chose: imported actor log 只接受 intent.sealed、intent.superseded、intent.abandoned，并要求至少一个 author-sealed intent。
decisions.rationale: constraints/risks/followups/check judgments/merge acknowledgements 是 upstream team state 或 upstream evidence，不能由 fork actor log 直接提升；merged evidence 仍由 upstream pin notes 产生。

decisions.chose: 关闭同一分支上早期分层 proposal，用当前 PR head 的单一 final integrated intent 表达完整改动。
decisions.rationale: 早期 proposal 是同一 PR 的阶段性实现，不是并行竞争方案；保留多个 proposed 会让 preflight 误判为同文件集冲突。

rejected.alternative: 只在 Hub 中展示 imported GitHub PR metadata
rejected.reason: 这只能解释 PR，不能把 contributor 的 author-sealed actor log 纳入 upstream Mainline state。

rejected.alternative: 导入 fork git notes 作为 merged evidence
rejected.reason: notes 是 upstream main commit 的证据，应由 upstream pin/auto-pin 写入；fork notes 可能指向 fork-only commits 或 stale merge guesses。

rejected.alternative: 允许 fork actor log 携带 constraints、risks、checks 或 merge acknowledgements
rejected.reason: 这些会污染 upstream team truth surface，破坏 maintainer accept 与 upstream evidence 的边界。

review_notes: 此 seal 覆盖 PR head cf51ffa27d8ef47f8adca5a7b61189724f7a16c8，包括 968faad、c7fd798、e7ebb0b、e706b8e、f90a56e、cf51ffa。
Review follow-up 已修复：无 sealed intent 的 actor log 会被拒绝；fork-side signal events 会在写入 upstream actor ref 前被拒绝；fork-side merge acknowledgement 也会被拒绝。
已本地验证过相关面：pin/notes/context、hub、cli、domain focused tests 与 git diff --check；一个更宽的 engine regex 曾在 coverage 相关测试处超时，未作为通过结论使用。
GitHub latest head 上 CI、Build & Test 1.22/1.23、Lint、CodeQL、Mainline PR Intent checks 已成功。

architectural_claims: Fork contributor Mainline metadata crosses into upstream only through explicit maintainer actor-log import or normal team-remote publish, not through PR body parsing.
Accepted actor-log provenance is domain state shared by CLI, Hub, and JSON export surfaces.
Imported fork branch refs make code objects reachable without treating fork notes or fork-side merge evidence as upstream truth.
Hub external contribution records remain not-author-sealed fallback metadata and do not affect actor counts, review queues, coverage, or pin logic.
behavioral_changes: mainline actor import can fetch a contributor actor log from a fork remote or source ref, validate ancestry and actor ownership, accept it into upstream actor refs, record provenance, rebuild the view, auto-pin, and push accepted metadata when an upstream remote is configured.
actor import rejects source logs without author-sealed intents and rejects unsupported fork-side signal/check/merge events before updating the upstream actor ref.
mainline publish accepts --remote so fork contributors can publish actor metadata to a writable fork remote without marking the local intent as team-proposed.
Hub list/detail/export surfaces expose external contribution and accepted actor-log provenance without polluting review state.
Seal/publish failure guidance now points agents toward fork remote publish and PR description generation when upstream refs are not writable.

data_model_changes.name: IntentProvenance
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing views omit provenance; rebuild fills it when actor_log.accepted events exist.

data_model_changes.name: ActorLogAcceptedEvent
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Additive actor-log event used to record upstream accept provenance.

data_model_changes.name: refs/mainline/imports/<actor>/branches/*
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Only created by explicit actor import from a fork remote to keep fork code objects reachable.

security_implications: Fork actor refs are not trusted by normal sync; maintainer import is explicit and validates event ancestry, actor ownership, supported event types, and presence of at least one author-sealed intent.
Fork-side constraints, risks, followups, check judgments, and merge acknowledgements are rejected instead of becoming upstream team signals or merge evidence.
Fork remote publish does not grant upstream refs write access and does not mark the intent team-visible unless publishing to the configured team remote succeeds.
Imported branch ref names are sanitized and validated with git check-ref-format before use.
migration_notes: No migration required. Existing views and actor logs remain readable; new provenance appears only for newly accepted actor logs or after rebuild from existing actor_log.accepted events.
Teams with maintainer backfills can later import contributor actor logs; multiple intent refs may coexist on the same upstream merge commit note.
